nodes.label: Regression tests for issue #1446 — glued-bold-heading lift in renderMd().  LLMs
Sentence-glued **Heading** with period before it must be lifted to its own parag
Glued-bold after `?` should also lift — common in LLM reasoning mode.
Glued-bold after `!` should also lift — emphatic transition.
Bold mid-sentence with no period before and no `\\n\\n` after must NOT be lifted
Bold at end of paragraph WITHOUT a sentence-terminator before it must stay inlin
`text **important**.\\n\\n` (period AFTER bold) must NOT trigger the lift —
`text.**Bold**\\nMore text` (single newline, no blank line) must NOT be lifted —
Bold runs longer than 80 chars are likely emphasis prose, not headings — don't l
`text **bold**\\n\\n` (space before `**`, no glued period) must NOT be lifted.
Chained glued-heading paragraphs should all lift — common LLM thinking-mode shap
The lift regex must be present in ui.js before protected-code restores.      Thi
The lift's inner-bold-text class must exclude `*` and `\\n` so multi-line/nested
Drive the real ui.js renderMd and confirm the lift fires in the basic case.
Glued pattern inside fenced code MUST stay literal — fence_stash is active when
Raw literal <pre> content must stay byte-preserved when it contains the glued tr
Glued pattern inside inline backticks must stay literal.
Mid-paragraph emphasis must stay inline in the real renderer.
Chain of glued headings — verifies the regex's `g` flag fires multiple times.
